* * *
Why Stretch?  Benefits  What to Expect 
##  The StretchLab Difference 
Don't just stretch - get stretched. StretchLab's team of highly trained Flexologists® will give you a deeper stretch than you could ever achieve on your own. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/stretches/)
##  Reclaim your Freedom 
Imagine standing taller, running faster, bending easier – now make that a reality. Assisted stretching will improve your range of motion, flexibility and reduce pain and tension. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/benefits/)
##  Get Ready to Live Long 
Never been to StretchLab? You’re in for a treat. Our studios are open, fun & energetic! Your stretch will be customized to fit your body's needs and help you meet your flexibility goals. 
[ Learn More ](https://stretchlab.com/first-timers/)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Location_Pre-Open/PreOpen_SLdifference.jpg)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Location_Pre-Open/PreOpen_SLdifference.jpg)
![](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/Location_Pre-Open/PreOpen_SLdifference.jpg)
##  Flexologists 
![Alex](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p/OdrksXAvszuPzK-LVlkmG_qJxYTToqxY7pBDrRa6WeY/3024x4032.jpg)
Alex 
Master Flexologist 
Hey, I'm Alex Merchant . My hometown is Houston, TX . I’ve been around Austin for the last 5 years , I graduated from Texas State University with my undergrad and Masters degree in Exercise Science . My background is primarily in Rehab and Sports Performance . Aside from training, I enjoy traveling, live music , learning new crafts , hanging out with friends and family but I really enjoy food ! I’ve been with StretchLab since 2021 and have enjoyed working in the company ! I will always promote health and wellness as a major driving force to who I am , and look forward to helping everyone achieve their goals! 
![Najeeb](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p/G4sszLa4Aagy6S3X6yy9yzEL1ANScChkZdGrPqjRbgA/1119x1554.png)
Najeeb 
Flexologist 
I’ve been a certified Athletic Trainer for 8 years working in sports and healthcare for both amateur and professional athletes. I enjoy spending time with family and friends, playing or attending a basketball game, and outdoor activities such as hiking or tailgating for a football game. What I love about StretchLab is the family vibe I feel on a daily basis as well as the diverse background amongst the other Flexologists. Both of these factors help curate a fun environment where I can continue to learn and grow as a clinician. 
![Cat](https://a.mktgcdn.com/p/CGI36IHLH_sVzIfBpuwIMxH9baooVkOlEy3Rcm8qqIY/405x540.jpg)
Cat 
Flexologist 
My name is Cat Sustaita. I am certified by the state in personal training and as a nutrition specialist. I am receiving a B.A from St. Edward’s university in kinesiology with a minor in business. I am a former collegiate athlete and have always been physically active. I chose StretchLab because I’ve always enjoyed helping people become more aware of their physical body and love to connect with others on a personal level. 
##  Our Stretch Services 
![One on one session with a Flexologist](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/fpo2.jpg)
## One on One
A 25 or 50 minute one-on-one stretch customized to your specific needs, focusing on problem areas or targeting certain muscle groups. 
![Flexologist assisting person stretching](https://www.stretchlab.com/hubfs/stretchlab.com/jpgs/fpo3.jpg)
## Group Stretch
Group Stretches are led by one of our highly trained Flexologists who will guide you through a series of stretches and teach proper stretch tool use. 
[ Learn More ](https://www.stretchlab.com/stretches)
##  HELP YOUR FRIENDS MOVE BETTER 
Know someone who could benefit from better mobility and greater range of motion? Invite your friends and family to enjoy up to 50% off their first assisted stretch.
[ Refer A Friend ](https://lp.stretchlab.com/refer-your-friends)
Follow Westlake 
  * [ ](https://instagram.com/stretchlabwestlake)
  * [ ](https://www.facebook.com/2109865725992085)
  * [ ](https://www.linkedin.com/company/stretchlab/)


##  about Westlake 
StretchLab is revolutionizing one-on-one assisted stretching and flexibility training classes. In your 25 or 50 minute one-on-one session, you will work with one of our trained flexologists who will guide you through a series of stretches custom designed for your specific needs. In our innovative group sessions – no matter what your range of motion or fitness level is, we have a solution for you. Our group stretches are Flexologist led and will help to increase your flexibility and improve your range of motion.
[ Learn More ](https://www.stretchlab.com/stretches)
